lines.text: Welcome to our hotel. Do you have a reservation?
lines.fullTranslation: Otelimize hoş geldiniz. Bir rezervasyonunuz var mı?

lines.text: Yes, I booked a room under the name Carter.
lines.fullTranslation: Evet, Carter adı altında bir oda ayırttım.

lines.text: May I see your passport, please?
Certainly. Here it is.
I would like to order room service.
What would you like to order?
A sandwich and a bottle of water, please.
lines.fullTranslation: Bir sandviç ve bir şişe su, lütfen.

lines.text: Your order will arrive within thirty minutes.
The air conditioning in my room is not working.
I apologize for the inconvenience.
We will send someone to fix it immediately.
lines.fullTranslation: Onu hemen tamir etmek için birini göndereceğiz.

lines.text: Thank you. I appreciate it.
What time is breakfast served?
Breakfast is served from seven until ten.
lines.fullTranslation: Kahvaltı yediden ona kadar servis ediliyor.

lines.text: Is it included in the room price?
Yes, breakfast is included.
Would it be possible to check out later?
lines.fullTranslation: Daha geç çıkış yapmak mümkün olur mu?

lines.text: How late would you like to stay?
Until two o’clock in the afternoon.
That can be arranged for an additional fee.
Could you tell me the Wi-Fi password?
Certainly. It is written on your room card.
lines.fullTranslation: Tabii ki. O oda kartınızın üzerinde yazıyor.

lines.text: Is the connection reliable?
Yes, it works well throughout the hotel.
lines.fullTranslation: Evet, otelin her yerinde iyi çalışıyor.

lines.text: Could you recommend some places to visit nearby?
lines.fullTranslation: Yakında ziyaret edilecek bazı yerler tavsiye edebilir misiniz?

lines.text: The old town and the museum district are very popular.
lines.fullTranslation: Eski şehir ve müze bölgesi çok popüler.

lines.text: How can I get there?
You can take tram number four from outside the hotel.
lines.fullTranslation: Otelin dışından dört numaralı tramvayı alabilirsiniz.

lines.text: Could I get some extra towels for my room?
lines.fullTranslation: Odam için ekstra havlu alabilir miyim?

lines.text: Of course. How many would you need?
lines.fullTranslation: Tabii ki. Kaç tane ihtiyacınız olur?

lines.text: Two additional towels would be enough.
We will bring them to your room shortly.
Could you call a taxi for me?
lines.fullTranslation: Benim için bir taksi çağırabilir misiniz?

lines.text: Certainly. Where would you like to go?
To the central train station.
The taxi should arrive in about five minutes.
lines.fullTranslation: Taksi yaklaşık beş dakika içinde gelmeli.

lines.text: My room is very noisy at night.
I am sorry to hear that.
Would it be possible to change rooms?
Let me check what rooms are available.
lines.fullTranslation: Hangi odaların uygun olduğuna bakmama izin verin.

lines.text: Does the hotel have a fitness center?
lines.fullTranslation: Otelin bir spor merkezi var mı?

lines.text: Yes, it is located on the second floor.
Is it open twenty-four hours a day?
lines.fullTranslation: O günde yirmi dört saat açık mı?

lines.text: No, it closes at eleven in the evening.
lines.fullTranslation: Hayır, akşam saat on birde kapanıyor.

lines.text: How was your stay with us?
Everything was excellent. I really enjoyed it.
lines.fullTranslation: Her şey mükemmeldi. Gerçekten keyif aldım.

lines.text: Would you like the invoice by email?
Yes, that would be very convenient.
